holdings.infoBox: AMLP is an equity ETF with a total of 14 individual holdings. The top holdings are Western Midstream Partners stock at 13.05%, Plains All American Pipeline at 12.49%, Sunoco LP at 12.48%, Energy Transfer LP at 12.29%, and Enterprise Products Partners at 12.03%.

overview.description: The Alerian MLP ETF (AMLP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Alerian MLP Infrastructure index, a market-cap-weighted index of publicly-traded energy infrastructure MLPs in the US. AMLP was launched on Aug 24, 2010 and is issued by SS&C.

data.title: US natural gas futures rise as demand outlook strengthens
data.text: U.S. natural gas futures climbed about ​3% on Wednesday on forecasts for hotter-than-normal weather and more demand over the next two weeks than previously expected.

data.text: North American midstream M&A activity has slowed into 2026 relative to 2025. For many midstream companies, organic growth projects and returning capital to shareholders are seen as more attractive.
